overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic urban environment (Cyberpunk 2077). The player walks along a rain-soaked commercial street lined with palm trees and neon signs, then turns into a narrow graffiti-covered alleyway leading to an industrial area with smokestacks and scattered debris. The overcast weather and wet surfaces create a dystopian cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with palm trees and neon storefronts

events.description: vehicles pass by on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the commercial sidewalk past storefronts with glowing neon signs

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk, moving away from camera

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the street against the overcast sky
glowing green neon open sign on the building facade
multi-story building with large windows and signage
wet concrete sidewalk with red painted curb

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a commercial street at dusk with palm trees and neon signs. The camera walks forward along the wet sidewalk as vehicles pass on the left, following a pedestrian ahead. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with mixed natural and neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: turns right from commercial street into narrow alleyway between buildings
ground shows rain puddles and scattered paper trash

agents.ego_description: turns right into the narrow alleyway and proceeds down the enclosed passage

entered.detail: tall concrete wall of adjacent building with graffiti
building wall covered in colorful graffiti tags
rainwater puddles reflecting the gray sky
overhead utility poles and tangled wires spanning the alley

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into a narrow enclosed alleyway, leaving the commercial street behind. The walls are covered in graffiti and the ground is wet with puddles. Overhead power lines crisscross between the buildings as the camera moves deeper into the alley.

events.description: alley opens up revealing industrial buildings and smokestacks in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing through the widening alley as industrial structures become visible ahead

entered.detail: green dumpsters lined up against the right wall
tall cylindrical industrial structure marked with 06
tall concrete barrier wall replacing the building facade

segments.scene_description: The alley gradually widens as the camera approaches an industrial zone. Green dumpsters appear on the right while a tall concrete wall runs along the left. In the distance, industrial towers and smokestacks become visible against the gray sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial yard with smokestacks and scattered debris

events.description: enters the open industrial yard from the narrow alley passage
view reveals extensive industrial smokestacks and factory buildings with steam emissions

agents.ego_description: moving through the open industrial area surveying the surroundings and approaching distant figures

notable_agents.action: standing near a parked vehicle in the industrial yard

entered.detail: large industrial building with smokestacks emitting white smoke
scattered concrete blocks, metal sheets, and construction debris
painted red curb marking the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into a wide-open industrial yard filled with debris and concrete barriers. Large factory buildings with smoking smokestacks dominate the background. A few NPCs stand near parked vehicles as the camera explores the area, revealing the scale of the industrial complex.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit commercial street into a desolate and expansive industrial wasteland. It begins by walking along a wet sidewalk lined with palm trees and glowing signs, following a pedestrian as vehicles pass by in the dusk light. The camera then turns right, leaving the main road to enter a narrow, enclosed alleyway where graffiti-covered walls and crisscrossing power lines create a claustrophobic atmosphere. As the alley gradually widens, the scene shifts toward an industrial zone marked by green dumpsters and a towering concrete wall, with smokestacks appearing against a gray sky. Finally, the camera emerges into a wide-open yard filled with debris and concrete barriers, revealing the massive scale of factory buildings and smoking towers in the distance.
